attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
MT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT ,
MT.DV_MEASURE_NAME               ,
MT.BK_MEASURE_NAME               ,
MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
COALESCE(NSTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY,MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) AS RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
100 AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,
CASE WHEN NSTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY IS NULL THEN 'A' ELSE 'H' END AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG,
MT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
MT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         ,
MT.SRC_ENTITY_NAME               ,
MT.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
MT.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
MT.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT        ,
MT.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
MT.RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT        ,
MT.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT           ,
MT.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT         ,
MT.PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
MT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
MT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
MT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
MT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
MT.RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,
MT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
MT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
MT.XCAT_FLG                      ,
MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           ,
MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            ,
MT.ELA_FLG                       ,
MT.DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
MT.DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
MT.REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
MT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
MT.POB_TYPE_CD                   ,
MT.PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG      ,
MT.DEFERRAL_REV_USD_AMT
,'=' AS NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM FINLGLVWDB.MT_FINANCE_DEFERRED_REVENUE MT
/*INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DEFREV_CCW_MONTH_CNTL WIMCTL
ON WIMCTL.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT=MT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT*/
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_TERR_RSTMNT_MAPPING  NSTRM 
ON MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTRM.ORIG_SLS_TERR_KEY
WHERE DV_MEASURE_NAME NOT IN ('PRODUCT_CCW','SERVICE_CCW')
AND MT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_DFR_OPEN_PERIOD WHERE OPEN_FLAG='Y')
